yt_title: Vending Machines, Paparazzi App, and Event Software

business_ideas.idea: Vending machine business selling beverages in apartments and motels
Subscription-based vending service with capped daily/weekly dispensing
Post-workout machine for gyms with supplements and recovery products
Ghost kitchen for food gifting (Edible Arrangements on DoorDash)
Paparazzi app: social network where others take candid photos of you
Lawsuit financing: fund cases and take percentage of settlements
Tread: circular commerce resale platform embedded in Shopify stores

predictions.text: Pent-up demand post-COVID will surge for events, travel, and in-person experiences
Resale and circular commerce will become standard part of brand revenue model
Social apps remain highly unpredictable; hard to forecast winners early
